tracks.meaning: the act of going or coming into a place or space
an item or record placed in a book, list, database, or filing system
a record of official proceedings, transactions, or legal documents filed in court
the right of access to a market, venue, or competition granted to a participant
a means of access to a computer system or application, typically requiring authentication
the act of an actor coming onto the stage as indicated in a script
a statement, remark, or word spoken or written as a contribution to a conversation or text
a recorded transaction or item of income and expenditure in an account or ledger
the act of a patient being admitted into a hospital or medical facility
permission to participate in a game, race, or sporting event
an attempt or effort to do something or to make a particular impression
